name: podium
description: Podium — the mobile + canvas automation MCP for AI agents: iOS & Android control, native UI automation, Maestro E2E, React Native debugging, and a no-vision canvas/WebGL brain that taps game UIs like DOM elements — for Claude Code.

plugins.name: podium-mcp
plugins.description: Unified mobile + canvas automation MCP — 51 tools for iOS (simulator + real) and Android: native UI automation, a no-vision canvas/WebGL brain (Pixi/Konva/Three/Babylon…), Maestro E2E flows, React Native debugging, and WebView DOM + network capture.
